g.text: Same task (domain detection, ARI vs Maynard 2021 layers) x same data (5 DLPFC Visium slices). sklearn & spatial-aware: 3 seeds, oracle-K. SOTA: 1 seed (42), oracle-K + 3 blind estimate-K.
